title: run_telemetry
description: Single line of run_telemetry.jsonl. One record per phase-completion. Owner: any phase that calls emit_telemetry.

mode.description: How the contract executed. 'inline' = orchestrator read the specialist .md and followed it itself (the only option when opensource-contributor runs as a subagent, since the Claude Code harness does not grant Agent to spawned subagents). 'dispatched' is reserved for a future top-level slash-command orchestrator that can fan out to specialists via real Agent calls.

subagent_id.description: Identifier for the dispatched subagent's transcript. Only present when mode=dispatched.
